name: Texas Brownie Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 or 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Cooking time: 30 minutes.
Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a bowl. Add sugar to the same bowl.
In a saucepan, combine melted margarine, Crisco, cocoa powder, and water. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
Pour the boiling mixture over the flour and sugar mixture while hot, beating well.
Add milk, beaten eggs, and vanilla extract. Beat until smooth.
Pour batter into a greased large cookie sheet (11x17 inches). The batter will be thin.
Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes.
After cooling, prepare frosting by combining margarine, cocoa powder, milk, powdered sugar, and vanilla extract in a saucepan. Bring mixture to a boil, then beat well.
Pour frosting over the cooled cake and top with chopped pecans.
